raw: This printable pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free but must have a timed ticket. Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass. You no longer need to make a reservation. Just bring the print out pass with you.
